# Glitch Text Effect

> Free online glitch text generator. Converts plain text into glitched, corrupted, cursed and zalgo-style Unicode text you can copy and paste into Minecraft, Discord, social bios and usernames. No signup, works in the browser.

All text effects are produced with Unicode combining characters and lookalike glyphs, so the output pastes anywhere that accepts Unicode.

## Main tools

- [Glitch Text Generator](https://glitchtexteffect.com/): the core generator with adjustable glitch intensity
- [Minecraft Glitch Text](https://glitchtexteffect.com/how-to-get-glitch-text-in-minecraft): how to use glitched text in Minecraft chat, signs and names
- [Animated Glitch Text](https://glitchtexteffect.com/animated): animated glitch effects for video and social
- [Discord Glitch Text](https://glitchtexteffect.com/discord): glitch text for Discord names and messages
- [Cursed Text](https://glitchtexteffect.com/freaky): heavier zalgo/cursed text effects
- [Cool Symbols](https://glitchtexteffect.com/cool-symbols) and [Cool Text](https://glitchtexteffect.com/cool-text): symbol and font-style generators

## Reference

- [Examples](https://glitchtexteffect.com/examples): sample glitch text output
- [FAQ](https://glitchtexteffect.com/faq): how glitch/zalgo text works and where it can be used
- [About](https://glitchtexteffect.com/about)
